entries.detail: Pursuing a BSE with focus on autonomous systems and embedded hardware. Research assistant in the Robotics Lab.
Designed sensor fusion boards for next-gen UAV navigation. 3 PCBs from schematic to production in 10 weeks.
Built data acquisition systems for plasma diagnostics. Wrote real-time signal processing pipelines in C++.
Led the electrical subsystem for a 120lb competition robot. Regional finalists. Designed the entire power distribution and sensor network.
